apple 1

Apple 1 Emulator

Version 1.0.0

A faithful emulation of the 1976 Apple 1 personal computer

CPU: MOS Technology 6502 @ 1.022 MHz

RAM: 32 KB

Display: 40 x 24 characters (green phosphor)

ROM: Woz Monitor (256 bytes)

Languages: Integer BASIC, 6502 Assembly

Original Apple 1 designed by Steve Wozniak, 1976
Emulator by Akshay Anand, 2026
